textPlain: Him using different ones is why I use Perplexity, I get to try different models and honestly its pretty darn decent, gives me everything in an organized way, I can see all the different links, and all the files it outputs can be downloaded as a simple zip file. It has everything from GTP5 to Deepseek R1 and even Grok.There's other sites similar to perplexity that host multiple models as well, I have not tried the plethora of others, I feel like Perplexity does the most to make sure whatever model you pick it works right for you and all its output is usefully catalogued.
